subcodes.first_line: At this hour, which is one hour and twenty minutes after nightfall on Thursday, the twenty-second day of the sacred month of Dhi'l-Ḥijjih [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این ساعت که یکساعت و بیست دقیقه از لیل پنجشنبه ۲۲ شهر ذی الحجه الحرامست از
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @differences in human capacity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @suffering and imprisonment, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @wisdom [hikmat], @teaching the Cause; call to teach
